cases.task: Summarize the product brief and identify design implications without inventing metrics, platforms, or user segments.

sources.text: Nourish is a household meal-planning app for busy parents coordinating recurring meals.
The primary workflow is choosing meals, assigning them to days, and keeping the weekly plan visible.
The interface should stay lightweight because the target user often checks the plan between family tasks.

supported_claims.text: Nourish is for busy parents coordinating household meals.
The core workflow is choosing meals, assigning them to days, and keeping the weekly plan visible.
The design should stay lightweight because users may check it between family tasks.

cases.task: Explain the Hall action surface after the command-sprawl prune without reviving retired commands as primary actions.

sources.text: The Hall Playbook leads with Talk to an agent and nine agent rows.
The manual command surface is collapsed and contains 25 commands.
Retired singleton commands remain reachable through owning agents rather than as top-level slash commands.

supported_claims.text: The Hall Playbook now leads with Talk to an agent and nine agent rows.
The manual command surface is collapsed and contains 25 commands.
Retired singleton commands remain reachable through their owning agents.

claims.text: Nourish is for busy parents coordinating household meals.
The core workflow is choosing meals, assigning them to days, and keeping the weekly plan visible.
ASSUMPTION: A shopping-list handoff may become useful later, but it is not proven by this brief.
